scope: Battle Command frontline pressure strip desktop QA

中央塹壕線 接敵 / 敵圧 470 / 敵 2群 / 守備 1旅団 / 固守監視

observedLog: 戦線圧力対応: 中央塹壕線の1旅団を固守監視へ移行。衛戍予備歩兵大隊の集中射撃目標をアンデッド群集 36体へ指定。
notes: Frontline pressure strip renders all five frontline segments before enemy contact.
After enemy waves spawn, the strip updates pressure levels, enemy counts, defenders, main threat, and recommended response.
A pressure-card response applies the recommended standing order and focus target to the responsible frontline defender.
Mobile-specific QA remains deferred by current project direction.
